seoTitle: How to Reset Udemy Course Progress and Start Over
metaDescription: Clear your course history on Udemy and start a lesson from scratch, useful for revisiting material or reinforcing what you've already learned.
intro: Sometimes it's worth going back through a Udemy course from the beginning, whether to reinforce material after a long break or to retake it with fresh focus. This covers finding the course progress settings and resetting where you left off so you can start clean.

steps.heading: Open the course you want to reset
steps.body: Go to your Udemy dashboard and select the course whose progress you want to clear.

steps.heading: Find the progress settings for the course
steps.body: Navigate to the course's progress or history options where your completed lectures are tracked.

steps.heading: Reset your progress
steps.body: Choose the option to reset or clear your course progress so it shows as unstarted again.

steps.heading: Confirm your learning path going forward
steps.body: Decide whether you're retaking the full course or just specific sections, and plan your path accordingly.

faq.question: Why would I want to reset my course progress?
faq.answer: It's useful if you want to revisit a course after a long break, retake it for reinforcement, or reorganize how you're tracking your learning.

faq.question: Does resetting progress delete the course itself?
faq.answer: No, resetting progress just clears your completion tracking; the course stays in your account and you can start it again.

faq.question: Will resetting affect a certificate I already earned?
faq.answer: A certificate you've already downloaded should remain valid; resetting progress is about your ongoing tracking, not past records.

faq.question: Is this useful for professionals refreshing their skills?
faq.answer: Yes, professionals often reset progress to revisit a course when they need a refresher on a topic relevant to a new role or project.
